payload.description: Subway customer accident rates declined YoY

payload.claim_text: Bus customer accident rates decreased year over year, and bus collision rates increased over the same periods.
payload.subject: NYCT Bus
payload.description: Bus customer accident rates decreased but collision rates increased

tool_args.label: NYCT Employee Lost Time Accident Rate Increase

payload.claim_text: Employee Lost Time Accident (LTA) rates increased overall, which was attributable to the inclement weather conditions during the winter storms and the lasting post-storm effects.
payload.subject: NYCT employees
payload.description: Employee LTA rates increased due to winter storms
10.4% increase in subway fire incidents on a 12-month rolling basis between periods ending March 2026 and March 2025

payload.claim_text: MTA Construction & Development (C&D) continues to demonstrate stable safety performance across the capital program, supported by ongoing efforts to strengthen contractor oversight and hazard prevention.

payload.description: Stable safety performance across capital program

payload.claim_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority Police Department (MTA PD), a force of over 1,300 sworn officers serving the LIRR, MNR, SIR, MTA bridges, and key Transit hubs continued to advance its mission of safeguarding riders, employees, and critical infrastructure.
payload.subject: MTA Police Department
payload.description: MTA PD overview of over 1,300 sworn officers

payload.claim_text: Major (index) crime dropped by more than 12% for the quarter, with significant decreases in Burglary, Robbery, Felony Assault and Grand Larceny year over year.

payload.description: 12%+ crime reduction in Q1 2026
